name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: Five million Americans say it's time to impeach
body:
Activist -

The entire world watched the day Donald Trump took Vladimir Putin’s side in Helsinki, finally seeing what so many of us have been seeing for so long.

The world saw President Trump deny that Putin orchestrated a cyber-attack on our 2016 elections -- and deny the consensus of our intelligence community that Russia is already attempting to attack our elections again this year.

There’s a name for siding with a hostile foreign dictator against the American people and their democracy: Treason. And Donald Trump’s treason has put our nation’s very democracy at risk.

Impeachment was written into the Constitution to remove a president who, just like Trump, betrays the American people. Join our movement and demand his impeachment now!

Show you’re in today: Yes, I will stand with Need to Impeach now and demand Congress impeach President Trump. (http://www.needtoimpeach.com/impeach-trump-putin-lb/?utm_source=partner&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=demsdotcom-list-rental&utm_content=nti-lb_trump-putin)

Last month Special Counsel Robert Mueller indicted 12 Russian intelligence officers for hacking party platforms and stealing information from half a million American voters. That makes for 35 indictments in the investigation of Russian interference and related crimes, along with five guilty pleas — so far.

Trump dismissed these allegations because Putin — who was standing next to him at the time, after a two-hour private meeting — “was extremely strong and powerful in his denial.”

Since when does the U.S. president take the word of the leader of Russia on matters of national security? We cannot let this stand. We cannot allow ourselves to be led by a compromised president who not only allows but defends foreign attacks on our nation’s most elemental democratic processes.

We need to impeach Donald Trump.

We can’t wait any longer. Stand with Need To Impeach to defend democracy and help demand the impeachment of this compromised president. (http://www.needtoimpeach.com/impeach-trump-putin-lb/?utm_source=partner&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=demsdotcom-list-rental&utm_content=nti-lb_trump-putin)

More than 5.5 million Americans have joined our movement so far. Every day, more and more people are realizing that we cannot let this president endanger our democracy any longer.

Thank you,

Tom Steyer
If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please visit this link:
http://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNDAwLzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMjM3ODA5OTQy

Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

subject: A Major Victory on Trade
body:
| |
---
#
# _A Major Victory on Trade_
#
“President Trump won a major victory on trade on Monday, supplanting the North American Free Trade Agreement (NAFTA) and replacing it with something far more beneficial. The new deal will help American workers and manufacturers. It’s also a win for Mexico,” Christian Whiton writes in Fox News. Whiton notes that the President’s trade critics “have been proved wrong by an unmitigated victory for the USA. In the coming weeks, Tennessee voters are going to have their TVs, mailboxes, and newsfeeds flooded with negative attack ads. How do we know? Because our opponent’s top strategist made it clear when he said they’d bring “death by 10,000 cuts” to Phil Bredesen. But that’s not going to change how we’re running this campaign. We will remain focused on Tennessee, tune out the negativity and be vigilant about misinformation in order to win in November. We’re going to need your help to keep getting our positive message in front of voters. | | Friends,
More great tax reform news! A [recent study found](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=127A147A9A3864) that households across Alabama will save $1.28 billion on electricity bills over five years as a result of the Tax Cuts and Jobs Act.
The report also states that [Alabama's economy will grow](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=127A147A9A3865) by thousands of jobs and see $1.34 billion more in economic activity.
Americans are confident in our economy, and rightfully so. I am eager to continue working alongside my colleagues in Congress and the Trump Administration to make life better for Alabamians.
\- Martha

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: Stop by my State Fair booth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Klobuchar for Minnesota
body:
Hi,

Like so many of you, the State Fair is one of my favorite times of the year. From trying some of the newest fair foods and admiring the butter sculptures to enjoying the sights on the Mighty Midway -- the Fair truly offers something for everyone. And it brings our whole state closer together, something we can all celebrate.

But my favorite part of the Fair is talking with you, because hearing what's on your mind helps me do my job.

So stop by my booth on Judson Avenue across from the Dairy Building (just west of Underwood Street) and tell us how we can make a difference for Minnesota. You can also sign up to get a lawn sign or a bumper sticker, register to vote, and even pick up one of our new "Amy at the Fair" buttons.

Hope to see you there.

\-- Amy

P.S. This year I even got my own crop art portrait over at the Horticulture Building! It's not far from our booth so stop by on your way!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: Did you hear what Rudy Giuliani said last week?
body:
** Not really crimes...
------------------------------------------------------------

When Rudy Giuliana was being interviewed last week about the crimes of Paul Manafort, he suggested that because these crimes were white-collar crimes, that they don't really make Paul Manafort a criminal. The worst part is that this seems to be a trend in the Trump administration, they don't seem to think that white collar crime is really a problem that deserves solving.

Contrary to what Giuliana says, white collar crimes actually do put the American people in jeopardy. Anyone who remembers the 2008 crash knows that people's lives can be damaged by white collar crimes. Countless examples of people defrauded on a massive scale serve as evidence that the Trump administration is going in the wrong direction when it comes to dealing with corporate crimes.

It's time to put our country back on track. We need to not only hold Trump accountable for the corruption in his administration, but we also need to look towards the future and fight for some positive change. It is not enough to get back to where we started, we have to bring real change to the American people. It's time to double down on fighting white-collar crime, donate today to send a message that we will not tolerate white collar crimes.

name: Dana Bye
subject: what does “toss-up” mean?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
You might be wondering: What does it mean -- for us in VA-7 -- to be a toss-up race?
| | Peter, _Virginia 's 7th district is a toss-up race._ You probably know this, because we reference this fact in many of our messages to you. But you might be wondering, _what does it mean -- for VA-7 -- to be a toss-up race?_ When _The Cook Political Report_ or _CNN_ says we are a toss-up race, they mean:
* This is one of the most competitive House races across the country, and Abigail is one of the top candidates, with a compelling story and compelling ideas to share with voters.
* The path to the House majority runs through toss-up seats (like this one!). **That means control of the House could come down to _VA-7._**
* We should expect outside Republican groups -- including Super PACs that are not accountable to voters -- to spend heavily to prevent Abigail from winning this seat and bringing change to our community. **Our only chance is to outraise them through[robust grassroots support.](https://act.myngp.com/el/IAHI1L0S7CT6A22BfKwrzJmE128onWaF1x2XmzoLOwo=/KbKScIZJIIHsk9eNh7QGTnK5wVZkMTicQWStnSZ7N_c=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.28_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) **

We've already made history by building a competitive campaign in a historically red district, but the real history will be made on November 6th and in January 2019 when a new freshman class is sworn into Congress. Toss-up races are tough fights, and this campaign could very well come down to just a handful of votes. [**Will you make a donation today, ahead of our end-of-month deadline on Friday, to help us make sure this toss-up race ends in a win?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/IAHI1L0S7CT6A22BfKwrzJmE128onWaF1x2XmzoLOwo=/KbKScIZJIIHsk9eNh7QGTnK5wVZkMTicQWStnSZ7N_c=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.28_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) This deadline is important, Peter, because in a toss-up race, everything matters -- so we can't afford to miss a single fundraising goal. Otherwise, we risk falling short of our budget. [**Peter, please consider donating to Team Spanberger today so we can hit our goal and win this race.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/IAHI1L0S7CT6A22BfKwrzJmE128onWaF1x2XmzoLOwo=/KbKScIZJIIHsk9eNh7QGTnK5wVZkMTicQWStnSZ7N_c=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.28_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) Thank you, Dana Bye _Campaign Manager, Spanberger for Congress_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/IAHI1L0S7CT6A22BfKwrzJmE128onWaF1x2XmzoLOwo=/KbKScIZJIIHsk9eNh7QGTnK5wVZkMTicQWStnSZ7N_c=?refcode=em_fr_2018.08.28_b1_db_all&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/IAHI1L0S7CT6A22BfKwrzJmE128onWaF1x2XmzoLOwo=/KbKScIZJIIHsk9eNh7QGTnK5wVZkMTicQWStnSZ7N_c=?refcode=footer&amount=15&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000) _Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Here's why this request is so important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
We're relying on grassroots supporters like you.
#

Peter -
In a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to our campaign for New York Attorney General, but first, let me explain why this request is so important today:
The last official fundraising deadline before the primary is on Friday, and my opponents are likely calling their corporate donors all week to try to boost their fundraising. But we're doing things differently. We've rejected all corporate money -- instead we're relying on grassroots supporters like you.
We're proud that the vast majority of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts of money in response to emails like this one.
While we don't have to outraise our opponents, we can't fall too far behind, and that means we have to ask for your help. So here it is:
**[Will you make a $3 donation to our campaign today? We're up against the political and financial establishment's hand-picked candidates, and if we're in this together, we can beat them.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780920/6e822e2f/1aba1e9d/41725404/3719741113/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA4MjgtMS1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-primary-deadline?refcode=em180828-1-full")**
Our campaign is on fire right now. The powerful people and wealthy interests who don't want me anywhere near this office are likely terrified, and they could start spending even more to defeat us at the last minute. That's why we need to fight even harder.
It's the strength of our grassroots support that has gotten us to where we are today, and if we work together to keep up the momentum, we will win.
Best,
Zephyr

The White House • August 28, 2018
## ‘I Have a Dream,’ 55 years on
##
##
**Fifty-five years ago today** , Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. stood on the steps of the Lincoln Memorial and delivered what would become one of the great speeches in America’s history at the March on Washington for Jobs and Freedom. **Half a century** after “I Have a Dream,” President Donald J. Trump says “our Nation reaffirms our commitment to protecting the promise of America for all our people.” That promise includes expanding opportunity for every citizen. “As a result, for example, we have already seen the unemployment rate for African Americans reach a record low.” [**Read President Trump’s message on the 55th anniversary of “I Have a Dream.”**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI4Ljk0MTg2ODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyOC45NDE4Njg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc4NzUzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&100&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/presidential-message-55th-anniversary-reverend-dr-martin-luther-king-jr-s-dream-speech/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
## Markets soar as President announces new deal
##
**A day after** President Trump announced a preliminary trade deal with Mexico, news broke that consumer confidence in August has reached its highest level since October 2000, CNBC reports. **That’s big news** : Consumer spending accounts for about 70 percent of all U.S. economic activity, so economists pay close attention to it. “These historically high confidence levels should continue to support healthy consumer spending in the near-term,” said Lynn Franco, director of economic indicators at The Conference Board. **The S&P 500 and NASDAQ also soared** to record highs yesterday as President Trump made good on his promise [**to renegotiate the North American Free Trade Agreement (NAFTA)**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI4Ljk0MTg2ODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyOC45NDE4Njg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc4NzUzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&101&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/president-donald-j-trump-keeping-promise-renegotiate-nafta/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d). “This is something that’s very special for our manufacturers and for our farmers from both countries,” President Trump told President of Mexico Enrique Peña Nieto in a phone call from the Oval Office yesterday. **“The Teamsters Union** has long been a leader in demanding real reforms to NAFTA to make it work for workers across all of North America,” Teamsters General President Jim Hoffa said. “We believe that the Administration has taken real steps to deal with our concerns.” [**CNBC: Consumer confidence pops to highest level since 2000**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI4Ljk0MTg2ODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyOC45NDE4Njg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc4NzUzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&102&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/cnbc-consumer-confidence-pops-august-highest-level-since-october-2000/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **In their words** : [**“Our Negotiator-in-Chief will close a deal [for] all Americans.”**](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI4Ljk0MTg2ODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyOC45NDE4Njg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc4NzUzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&103&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/briefings-statements/wtas-support-president-donald-j-trumps-trade-announcement-mexico/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d)
# Ivanka Trump: Why we must empower women
#
**Yesterday, Ivanka Trump** joined Ambassadors from across the Western Hemisphere at the Organization of American States (OAS) in Washington, D.C. Her message was simple: Women’s economic empowerment makes everyone better off. **“We believe, we know that the world is more prosperous** , more peaceful when women can fully participate in the economy,” Ms. Trump told OAS. “Advancing economic opportunity for women in our hemisphere is essential to fostering lasting peace, stability, and opportunities in the Americas.” **[Watch Ivanka Trump discuss the importance of women’s empowerment.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI4Ljk0MTg2ODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyOC45NDE4Njg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc4NzUzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&104&&&https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Hz55v8TDtQQ) ** **More** : **[President Trump honors the anniversary of women’s suffrage.](http://links.govdelivery.com:80/track?type=click&enid=ZWFzPTEmbXNpZD0mYXVpZD0mbWFpbGluZ2lkPTIwMTgwODI4Ljk0MTg2ODgxJm1lc3NhZ2VpZD1NREItUFJELUJVTC0yMDE4MDgyOC45NDE4Njg4MSZkYXRhYmFzZWlkPTEwMDEmc2VyaWFsPTE4Mzc4NzUzJmVtYWlsaWQ9ZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20mdXNlcmlkPWRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tJnRhcmdldGlkPSZmbD0mZXh0cmE9TXVsdGl2YXJpYXRlSWQ9JiYm&&&105&&&https://www.whitehouse.gov/presidential-actions/president-donald-j-trump-proclaims-august-26-2017-womens-equality-day/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=1600d) **

name: Jay Inslee
subject: 1,400 More Deaths Thanks to Trump's EPA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Donald Trump's coal agenda will threaten lives and our community's health.

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78127/2f5ea88d/7672bcfe/2cbc5ea9/4283887005/VEsH/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/trumps-coal-plan?utm_source=ema_2018-08-28_trump-power-plan&source=ema_2018-08-28_trump-power-plan&utm_campaign=trump-power-plan&utm_medium=ema") Friend, I'm sick and tired of emailing you about Trump's lack of leadership in the face of climate disasters. But we cannot let this one fly under the radar: President Trump's plan to roll back the Clean Power Plan is an utter climate catastrophe. Here's what's happening: President Obama's Clean Power Plan has been one of our most powerful tools to fight climate change. Trump's administration -- led by former lobbyists _for the coal companies_ \-- wants to replace it with an utter sham that flies in the face of global efforts to fight climate change. And what's worse? Their own analysis says **1,400 additional people will die a year** as a result of the increased pollution. Thousands more -- especially kids and seniors -- will suffer from asthma and upper respiratory problems. These kids will miss tens of thousands of school days. By the EPA's own counts, this is a serious threat to the health of our families. [**All this -- just to prop up Big Oil and Coal companies. We can't stand for this. Add your name to oppose Trump's absurd coal agenda -- and literally save lives.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78127/2f5ea88d/7672bcfe/2cbc5ea9/4283887005/VEsE/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/trumps-coal-plan?utm_source=ema_2018-08-28_trump-power-plan&source=ema_2018-08-28_trump-power-plan&utm_campaign=trump-power-plan&utm_medium=ema") | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78127/2f5ea88d/7672bcfe/2cbc5ea9/4283887005/VEsF/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/trumps-coal-plan?utm_source=ema_2018-08-28_trump-power-plan&source=ema_2018-08-28_trump-power-plan&utm_campaign=trump-power-plan&utm_medium=ema")
---
Look, the government has an obligation to protect our health. There's no question about that. And when they propose policies that will instead cause harm or death to thousands of Americans, we've got to demand answers.
Trump's efforts to prop up the dying coal industry come exactly at the time we need to be transitioning to clean energy options. We've proven in Washington state that it is possible to create jobs through the clean energy economy and protect our health and environment. But his band of science deniers would rather line the pockets of their coal lobbyist friends than do what's right for the American people.
Washingtonians know how harmful climate change is to our health -- at this very moment, we're experiencing the effects of horrific wildfires, extreme heat, and historically unhealthy air quality levels. A rollback of the Clean Power Plan will do nothing to help the air we breathe and will cause deadly long-term impacts both here in Washington and around the world.
We will not stand by and allow this cynical action to threaten our state. Washington has stepped up to challenge the Trump administration's damaging and unlawful actions before -- and we will do so again, right now. [**Sign our petition to oppose Trump's coal plan, and make sure they hear our dissent in the other Washington.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78127/2f5ea88d/7672bcfe/2cbc5ea9/4283887005/VEsC/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/trumps-coal-plan?utm_source=ema_2018-08-28_trump-power-plan&source=ema_2018-08-28_trump-power-plan&utm_campaign=trump-power-plan&utm_medium=ema")
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee
[ADD YOUR NAME »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78127/2f5ea88d/7672bcfe/2cbc5ea9/4283887005/VEsD/ "https://action.jayinslee.com/page/s/trumps-coal-plan?utm_source=ema_2018-08-28_trump-power-plan&source=ema_2018-08-28_trump-power-plan&utm_campaign=trump-power-plan&utm_medium=ema")

name: Cody Hankerson
subject: This is personal for me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
Peter,
My name is Cody. I’m a proud Morningside College alumni and a veteran, and I'm especially proud to be working as an organizer for J.D. Scholten here in Woodbury County. A big part of why I’m motivated to help J.D. is because of his passion for improving health care in America. While many of us prepare to celebrate this upcoming Labor Day weekend with picnics and get-togethers with loved ones, Texas is about to hear a court case brought by 20 Republican attorneys general to throw out the Affordable Care Act. And the Trump Administration is refusing to defend the law.
**This is personal for me.** If the Court rules in favor of doing away with Obamacare, more than 50 million Americans who have pre-existing conditions in their medical histories could once again find themselves nearly bankrupt and unable to find affordable health care. **My mom is one of those 50 million.** She works three jobs, but it’s still not enough to cover her medications for her rheumatoid arthritis which requires chemo treatment. There are some days she can’t even open a glass jar or make a sandwich because of the pain.
Only because of the courage of Senator John McCain were we able to defeat Steve King and House Republicans numerous attempts to gut the Affordable Care Act. Now the Republicans are resorting to the courts to get their way. I’m supporting J.D. because I know he will defend pre-existing condition protections for folks like my mom. He will also fight for her so that in ten years, when she’s unable to work but still too young for Medicare, she will be able to buy into the Medicare program. He also advocates for a public option choice for all Americans. **I support J.D. because he is fighting for people, not insurance company profits.** As J.D. doesn’t accept corporate PAC money, our campaign isn’t propped up by insurance and pharmaceutical companies, so we depend on the generosity and kindness of supporters like you. [**_I hope you will join me in this effort to send J.D. Scholten to Congress by donating here._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/2030969/10575786/822563937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2RjODdiMy0yYmFiLWU4MTEtYmNlNy0wMDBkM2ExMmI4MDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VFXah2az-vODjtnIglYTR_ZVuSSRjqLcsykCSHaA4lk=) Thank you,

Cody Hankerson
Field Organizer, Scholten4Iowa

name: Greg Stanton
subject: after tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress |
body:
Good Evening,

The moment has come. After tonight, I will be one of two remaining candidates running to represent the people of Arizona’s 9th District.

We’ve come a long way in 10 months. Together, we built a truly people-powered, grassroots campaign thanks to thousands of hours of volunteer work including: phone calls, folding letters, and going door-to-door listening to the great people of our district. In addition to the strongest ground game, we will not be outworked in raising the resources necessary for a successful campaign. We’ve now raised over $1.7 million dollars, with the majority of donations being $30.00 or less. That’s grassroots.

I’m running for Congress because I believe in our community - I’m a product of it. I grew up here in a working-class family. My dad was a shoe salesman and my mother was a part-time school teacher. While we didn’t ever have much monetarily, my parents taught me an essential value: “When there’s a need in your community, you fill it.”

My upbringing and my experience as Mayor taught me that you work with all people of good faith, Republican or Democrat, to advance your community. I led a bi-partisan coalition on the City Council to grow our local economy, expand opportunities for tech and local businesses, improve the public transportation system, protect our LGBTQ community, serve our disability community, make Phoenix one of America’s leaders in sustainability, support our veterans, and advocate for our schools. People across the political spectrum, from all walks of life, knew they had an advocate in the Mayor’s office. I commit to all people of Congressional District 9 that you will have an advocate in Congress.

As Mayor, I never scored points for giving a nice speech or making my way around the morning talk shows - I only wanted to be judged on the results I delivered. And that’s why I’m running for Congress: to get results. To be part of a wave of new leadership in Washington that will work every single day on delivering quality and affordable healthcare to every American, stamping out corruption, removing the influence of special interest money from our politics, rebuilding our crumbling infrastructure, and passing comprehensive immigration reform.

Though after tonight we will know who our opponent is, you won’t see me back on the campaign trail until Friday. Now is the time to honor and mourn Senator John McCain. Accordingly, tomorrow and Thursday I will instead join with millions of other Arizonans as we remember an authentic American hero. He was a great bi-partisan leader who did what he believed was right for the people of Arizona, regardless of consequence - a standard we should all try to emulate.

>From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Together we will win this November and bring real change to Washington.

Greg Stanton, Former Mayor of Phoenix and Candidate for Congress

Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

He was a great bi-partisan leader who did what he believed was right for the people of Arizona, regardless of consequence - a standard we should all try to emulate. From the bottom of my heart, thank you. Together we will win this November and bring real change to Washington. Greg Stanton, Former Mayor of Phoenix and Candidate for Congress | Paid for by Stanton for Congress | Stanton for Congress 4340 E Indian School Rd. body:
Pundits and pollsters have been speculating about our campaign since the minute we launched. |

[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa98e/34a064cc/dbc7cb7/70ed9d2/306222659/VEsH/ "https://staceyabrams.com/")

| | | Friends, In our campaign headquarters, we have a countdown that shows how many days we've got until Election Day: [](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa98e/34a064cc/dbc7cb7/70ed9d3/306222659/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODI4MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE082818-full-img") **So every morning when I walk into the office, I 'm reminded of just how little time we have left, and how much work we have left to do.** **After Labor Day, we are kicking this campaign into overdrive.** We're opening multiple new campaign offices, hiring more field organizers, and launching a massive vote by mail push. And on September 18 - _exactly three weeks from today_ - absentee ballots will start getting mailed out to Georgians. We _ALL_ need to step up now to be ready. So I'm asking: **[We are facing an important fundraising deadline this Friday at midnight, and our field team is depending on us to hit our goal so they have the resources they need to reach out to every single Georgian. Can I count on you to make a $3 donation before Friday?](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa98e/34a064cc/dbc7cb7/70ed9d0/306222659/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODI4MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE082818-full-link1")** Pundits and pollsters have been speculating about our campaign since the minute we launched. They have a lot of opinions about whether it's possible for a Democrat to win in a state like Georgia. But the pundits and the polls are not factoring in our grassroots team. They're not accounting for the size and strength of the people-powered, statewide movement we're building. Those of us on the ground see how hard our team of organizers and volunteers is working day and night. We know that THIS - a strong ground game focused on individual connections with Georgians - is how we won the primary, and it is what will lead us to victory in November. **But running a statewide voter outreach program like ours won 't be easy, and it won't be cheap. We've got 70 days; help us make the most of every second on our countdown by pitching in before our deadline this Friday at midnight:** **[https://secure.staceyabrams.com/AugustDeadline](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa98e/34a064cc/dbc7cb7/70ed9d1/306222659/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUwODI4MTgtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sya-august?refcode=IE082818-full-link2")** This is the campaign of a generation, and it's on us to see it through to victory. - Lauren Groh-Wargo
